title: ゴルシちゃん主催！人狼は誰だ！？

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Bonjour! Comment allez-vous! It's time to begin
the bloody feud that is the Werewolf game!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh, sounds like a blast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is hosting a social deduction game
called Werewolf. Besides herself and Nakayama
Festa, the participants include...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sirius Symboli, El Condor Pasa...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Manhattan Cafe, Satono Diamond, and
inexplicably, I've also managed to get myself
wrapped up in this.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The rules are simple! We must uncover the
werewolves hiding among us through rational
discussion. No fist fights! Ya got that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The roles are divided as follows—two werewolves,
one maniac, one fortune teller, one medium, and
two villagers. I'm one of the villagers.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: So, without further ado, let the game begin!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
There aren't many players, so I'll go ahead and
reveal that I'm the fortune teller.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Ha, you already trying to con everyone, Sirius? I'm the real fortune teller.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh. Look at you, coming at me like it's
nothing. I'll make sure you regret this.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, is one of you a werewolf? ...Wait,
actually, I'm getting strong maniac vibes here.
Well, you both act like maniacs in real life
anyway, so who can say!

text_block_list.name: Sirius & Nakayama
text_block_list.text: You're one to talk!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hey, El's usually super boisterous. How come she's
being so quiet?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...The werewolves tend to say very little. I believe
we should vote to execute El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So begins the second day... Gracious! The heroine
Golshi was tragically torn apart by a werewolf and
is now watching over you from the heavens
above.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
My divination is telling me that Manhattan Cafe
is a werewolf.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Well, my divination says that Satono Diamond's a werewolf.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um... Given what I know, that makes Nakayama
the fake fortune teller, and Cafe is a werewolf.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I believe... the opposite. Satono is a werewolf.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Well, it seems this discussion has come to a
stalemate. Although, that's the real thrill of this
game. Hehe... I'm getting quite excited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Given the state of things, it's likely that Sirius
Symboli and Satono Diamond will vote to execute
Manhattan Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Nakayama Festa and Manhattan Cafe will
vote to execute Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That leaves the deciding vote in my hands! Do I
vote for Manhattan Cafe or Satono Diamond?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please think back, Trainer. Who was it that first
cast suspicion on El?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember now. And it look likes those
suspicions were right on the money. Which
means...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Time to announce the result! Victory goes to...
the werewolf team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli was the one who identified El
Condor Pasa as a werewolf, so she's the real
fortune teller?!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, sorry for betraying your trust in me,
Trainer. I was the maniac, and I ratted El out—I
sacrificed my ally.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
By uncovering one of the werewolves, I made it
look like I was the real fortune teller.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Haha! The maniac sacrificing a werewolf? I like it.
You really threw the standard tactic out the
window.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
That gave my claims as the fortune teller more
credibility. And hey, we won in the end, so it's all
good.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Siriuuusss! Thank you so muuuuch!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Though... you did execute me on the first day.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Haha! You were the perfect bait!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, we won!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While reeling at how thoroughly I was duped, I
can't help but feel impressed at how clever
everyone's strategies were. Their scheming
certainly made for a fun time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Time to announce the result! Victory goes to...
the villager team!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Sigh... That didn't go as I'd hoped.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli was indeed the first one to cast
suspicion on El Condor Pasa. However, I surmised
that she was sacrificing her own ally with that
ploy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she was the maniac or a werewolf herself, then
deliberately revealing one of the werewolves
would make her claims as the "fortune teller" far
more persuasive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I concluded that was exactly the kind of crafty
scheme Sirius Symboli would stake her chances
on.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you, Trainer. Your judgment was... pretty
good.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Nice job seeing through Sirius's tricks. That wasn't
too shabby at all.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yay! A glorious victory for Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Not like I got a chance to actually do anything, though! You lousy bunch of... No, it was all you, Satono! Don't go devouring the medium on the first day, you cretin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things looked a little dicey for a moment, but I
managed to win it for us. Really immersing
yourself in such an intense game certainly makes
for a fun time.
